xsl:when.test: string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'

strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > 0 and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross and price/@gross = sizes/size/price/@gross and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > $cena_serwis

(strikethrough_retail_price and strikethrough_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross) or (promotion/price/normal_retail_price and price/@gross != sizes/size/price/@gross and promotion/price/normal_retail_price/iaiext:site/iaiext:price_per_size[@id = ../../../../../sizes/size/@id]/@gross > sizes/size/price/@gross)
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4835' or $cat_id = '4837' or $cat_id = '4854' or $cat_id = '6763' or $cat_id = '6774'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1568' or $cat_id = '4769' or $cat_id = '4770' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '5442' or $cat_id = '5443' or $cat_id = '6763'

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4707' or $cat_id = '4741' or $cat_id = '4748' or $cat_id = '4751' or $cat_id = '4758' or $cat_id = '4835' or $cat_id = '4851' or $cat_id = '5439' or $cat_id = '6774'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '4747' or $cat_id = '5440' or $cat_id = '5441' or $cat_id = '6764' or $cat_id = '6820' or $cat_id = '6821'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4652' or $cat_id = '4774' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '5438' or $cat_id = '6765'

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4440' or $cat_id = '4741' or $cat_id = '4744' or $cat_id = '4774' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '4780' or $cat_id = '4835' or $cat_id = '4852' or $cat_id = '5438'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4707' or $cat_id = '4731' or $cat_id = '4744' or $cat_id = '4835' or $cat_id = '4837'

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '1568' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4652' or $cat_id = '4675' or $cat_id = '4759' or $cat_id = '4772' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '4780' or $cat_id = '5438' or $cat_id = '6749' or $cat_id = '6764'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1568' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '4652' or $cat_id = '4759' or $cat_id = '4772' or $cat_id = '4854' or $cat_id = '6749' or $cat_id = '6783'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '4835' or $cat_id = '4851' or $cat_id = '6774'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '4652' or $cat_id = '4780' or $cat_id = '6749' or $cat_id = '6767'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '4769' or $cat_id = '4772' or $cat_id = '6761' or $cat_id = '6765' or $cat_id = '6767' or $cat_id = '6768' or $cat_id = '6769'

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1531' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '4652' or $cat_id = '4748' or $cat_id = '4750' or $cat_id = '4767' or $cat_id = '4786' or $cat_id = '4854' or $cat_id = '5438' or $cat_id = '5439'

$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '1551' or $cat_id = '3' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4739' or $cat_id = '4746' or $cat_id = '4759' or $cat_id = '4775' or $cat_id = '4792' or $cat_id = '4837' or $cat_id = '6763' or $cat_id = '6765' or $cat_id = '6774'
$cat_id = '0' or $cat_id = '384' or $cat_id = '4675' or $cat_id = '4746' or $cat_id = '4772' or $cat_id = '4773' or $cat_id = '4780' or $cat_id = '5438'
